reviews.review_title: Great content but very short for price
reviews.review_description:
I love this application of VR. Being able to take a tour of a historic site in my own home is already exciting. The fact that the tour is for a building that no longer exists is very cool. 

I will say for the price the tour is extremely short and there isn't any additional content in the self-guided mode. It might have been nice to get some additional readings about the cultural context of the area and what Jewish life might have been like throughout different ages of the temple.

Still, I'm glad to show support for this kind of use case.
